'''pafara''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:wyn|wyn]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-f-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:wyn|wyn]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| pafara
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:pæfæræth|pæfæræth]] || [[word:pæfæræj|pæfæræj]] || [[word:pæfæræsh|pæfæræsh]] || [[word:pæfæræ|pæfæræ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:pafafarath|pafafarath]] || [[word:pafafaraj|pafafaraj]] || [[word:pafafarash|pafafarash]] || [[word:pafafara|pafafara]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:pafarath|pafarath]] || [[word:pafaraj|pafaraj]] || [[word:pafarash|pafarash]] || [[word:pafara|pafara]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:pafafrath|pafafrath]] || [[word:pafafraj|pafafraj]] || [[word:pafafrash|pafafrash]] || [[word:pafafraf|pafafraf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:pafaratha|pafaratha]] || [[word:pafaraja|pafaraja]] || [[word:pafarasha|pafarasha]] || [[word:pafaraka|pafaraka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:pafarath|pafarath]] || [[word:pafaraj|pafaraj]] || [[word:pafarash|pafarash]] || [[word:pafara|pafara]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:pafarathal|pafarathal]] || [[word:pafarajal|pafarajal]] || [[word:pafarashal|pafarashal]] || [[word:pafarakal|pafarakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:pafarathatha|pafarathatha]] || [[word:pafarajaja|pafarajaja]] || [[word:pafarashasha|pafarashasha]] || [[word:pafaraka|pafaraka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:pafarathan|pafarathan]] || [[word:pafarajan|pafarajan]] || [[word:pafarashan|pafarashan]] || [[word:pafarakan|pafarakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:pafarathaoro|pafarathaoro]] || [[word:pafarajaoro|pafarajaoro]] || [[word:pafarashaoro|pafarashaoro]] || [[word:pafarakaoro|pafarakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|4a6dc77}}
